title: nymanina refracta
intro: Nymanina refracta is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Ericaceae. It is also known as the "Moss Pink" and is native to parts of North America. The medicinal properties of Nymanina refracta include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is said to provide health benefits such as wound healing, digestive aid, and stress relief.
